overall.description: A cinematic sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a yellow sports car driving through a rain-soaked neon-lit urban plaza before transitioning onto an elevated highway. The camera follows the vehicle through the futuristic cityscape with holographic billboards and towering advertisements, eventually continuing along the wet highway toward an enclosed bridge section.

approaching highway ramp entrance from open plaza

large illuminated screens displaying advertisements on building facades

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide urban plaza at night during heavy rain. A yellow sports car maneuvers through the wet asphalt, turning right toward a highway ramp. Holographic advertising towers and digital billboards illuminate the scene with neon colors, reflecting off the rain-soaked ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway on-ramp with concrete barriers

events.description: entering elevated highway ramp from open plaza
navigating the curving ramp while accelerating

agents.ego_description: accelerating up the highway ramp, following the curve to the right as the cityscape opens up

entered.detail: solid concrete barrier lining the left side of the ramp
concrete wall barrier on the right side of the ramp
raised highway structure with support columns visible below

segments.scene_description: The vehicle transitions from the open plaza onto an elevated highway ramp. Concrete barriers line both sides of the curving road, while the holographic advertising tower recedes into the left background. The camera follows the curve as the ramp ascends, with the city skyline becoming visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with red transit lane markings

events.description: rain intensity increases, reducing visibility and creating heavier reflections on pavement
passing under overhead highway structure and approaching tunnel

agents.ego_description: cruising along the elevated highway at high speed through the rain, approaching the tunnel entrance

entered.detail: concrete overpass spanning across the highway ahead
dedicated lane marked with red pavement coloring
tall buildings with illuminated windows visible through the rain haze

segments.scene_description: Driving along the elevated highway with red transit lane markings visible. The rain intensifies as the vehicle passes under an overhead structure. Distant city buildings are visible through the haze on the left, while concrete barriers continue along both sides of the road. The tunnel entrance becomes visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed bridge section with metal safety fencing approaching tunnel

events.description: entering enclosed bridge section with metal railings replacing concrete barriers
approaching tunnel portal with illuminated chevron directional signs

agents.ego_description: navigating the enclosed bridge section toward the tunnel portal, guided by directional signage

entered.detail: tall metal mesh fencing along the left side of the bridge
tall metal mesh fencing along the right side of the bridge
dark tunnel opening with illuminated edges and structural framing
reflective arrow signs indicating the curve direction toward the tunnel

segments.scene_description: The highway becomes more enclosed as metal safety fences replace the concrete barriers on both sides. The road continues through a bridge-like structure with overhead lighting, approaching a dark tunnel portal. Chevron directional signs guide the path as the environment becomes increasingly sheltered from the rain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vibrant, neon-lit urban plaza into the sheltered confines of an elevated highway tunnel. It begins with a yellow sports car maneuvering through heavy rain across wet asphalt, surrounded by towering holographic advertisements that cast colorful reflections on the ground. As the vehicle turns right, the scene shifts from the open plaza onto a curving elevated ramp, where the neon towers recede and the distant city skyline emerges through the haze. The camera then follows the car along the highway past red transit markings and under overhead structures, with the rain intensifying before the concrete barriers transition into metal safety fences. Finally, the environment becomes increasingly enclosed as the road passes through a bridge-like structure with overhead lighting, guided by chevron signs toward a dark tunnel portal.
